name: libsqlite3-dev
title: libsqlite3-dev
description:
SQLite 3 development files
SQLite is a C library that implements an SQL database engine.
Programs that link with the SQLite library can have SQL database
access without running a separate RDBMS process.
.
This package contains the development files (headers, static libraries)
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libsqlite3-dev because SQLite 3 development files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libsqlite3-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libsqlite3-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libsqlite3-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
